summary: Backend-only regression for the SEO + backlink overhaul (P0 meta tags, tel:E.164, /embed/badge.js, /press-kit, sitemap, admin SEO bot, product backwards compat, PHP -l). All 12 pytest tests PASSED on first run. PHP syntax check clean for all 6 changed files. seo_runs.wayback_status and seo_runs.wayback_count columns exist and are surfaced in admin Recent Activity (badge hidden while status='skipped' because container blocks archive.org as expected).
critical_code_review_comments: press-kit.php emits the embed snippets escaped as '<script src=' inside <code>/<pre> for copy-paste; this is correct, but consider also exposing a <textarea readonly> copy button for users on older browsers.

embed-badge.php always appends utm_source=badge — good for attribution; consider also utm_medium=embed and a configurable utm_campaign per partner to better track which partner site drives conversions.

Admin Recent Activity hides the wayback badge entirely when wayback_status is 'skipped'. Consider showing a faint 'Wayback · skipped' chip so admins can confirm the column is wired up even before the bot runs successfully (currently invisible in the preview env where archive.org is firewalled).

seo_clamp_title / seo_clamp_description should be unit-tested for edge cases (empty input, multi-byte chars, trailing punctuation truncation) — consider a small PHPUnit suite under /app/php-version/tests/.
test_credentials: admin@maventechsoftware.com / Admin@123 (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md) — login verified via POST /login.php, redirects to /admin.php?tab=dashboard with logout link visible.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reusable regression suite lives at /app/backend/tests/test_seo_backlink_overhaul.py. Length assertions use html.unescape() so & counts as 1 char per spec. tel: assertion enforces ^tel:\+1\d{10}$ and explicitly forbids the legacy 'tel:1-XXX-XXX-XXXX' dashed format. Admin SEO-bot test tries /admin.php?section=seo-bot, ?tab=seo-bot, ?tab=ai-blogger, ?tab=seo and passes if any renders with 200; 'Recent Activity' was found on ?section=seo-bot, ?tab=ai-blogger, and default /admin.php. Wayback HTTP success intentionally NOT asserted (archive.org blocked in container) — only DB schema + admin-renders-without-500 verified. seo_runs columns wayback_status (VARCHAR 20) and wayback_count (INT) confirmed via SHOW COLUMNS.
